title: Frost Enchantment
description: Just another, nother way to deal Ice damage, but from a range!
body:
# 📢Announcement
All future updates to this datapack will be available only on [Way too many Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-enchantments!), this will also mean this project will be permenantly archived until further notice.

# Description
This is a light weight datapack that adds a new enchantment called "Frost"!

This enchantment allows users to deal ice damage.

Can be applied to Bows and Crossbows!


### Notes:
This enchantment is incompatible with the [Flame](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Flame) Enchantment!


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
- [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP)
